Mayo-based freight service

Dependable Weekend Freight Between Mayo and Whitehorse

40 Mile Supply is a Mayo-based freight service built to keep supplies moving. We handle weekend freight runs, Whitehorse pickups, and practical delivery support for businesses, contractors, organizations, and local customers.

Practical Freight

Why 40 Mile Supply

A practical local freight company focused on the Mayo–Whitehorse route.

Mayo-Based, Route-Focused

We are built around the Mayo–Whitehorse corridor, with local knowledge and a clear service focus instead of one-size-fits-all logistics.

Reliable Weekend Runs

Weekend scheduling helps businesses and projects plan restocks, pickups, and deliveries without guesswork.

Practical Freight Support

From store orders and supplies to job-site materials and recurring runs, we offer straightforward coordination and responsive service.

About 40 Mile Supply

Built for the Mayo–Whitehorse Link

40 Mile Supply is launching with one clear goal: make it easier to move goods between Mayo and Whitehorse on a dependable schedule.

We focus on one route and do it well — weekend freight runs, Whitehorse pickups, and practical delivery support for businesses, contractors, organizations, and local customers.

Learn more about us

Who We Serve

Built for businesses, contractors, organizations, and local customers who need practical freight on the Mayo–Whitehorse route.

Local businesses and retailers

Restock runs, supplier pickups, and routine supply delivery.

Contractors and project crews

Tools, materials, and project freight for the Silver Trail and Mayo area.

Community organizations and offices

Supplies and materials moved on a schedule that works.

Households and small operators

Practical freight support when you need something moved.

Suppliers needing reliable movement

Northbound and southbound freight on the Mayo–Whitehorse route.

How It Works

1

Request a Quote

2

3

4

Delivery / Drop-Off

Need freight moved between Mayo and Whitehorse?

Get in touch for a quote, pickup coordination, or to ask about upcoming weekend runs.

40 Mile Supply is a Mayo-based freight service offering dependable weekend runs between Mayo and Whitehorse for supplies, pickups, project freight, and practical local delivery support.
